case_title: CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION vs. DAWSON, THEO JR. AKA THEO DAWSON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION SERVED APR-12-2003, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DAWSON, THEO JR. AKA THEO DAWSON
CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT, ISSUED; FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAWSON, THEO JR. AKA THEO DAWSON $3,222.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,801.68 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,046.68, THIS IS RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #035505. ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ORIGINAL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT DAWSON, THEO JR. AKA THEO DAWSON
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 5/20/03 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
